name: Apricot Fingers
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 375°F. Grease an 8-inch square baking tin and set aside.
Stir together the oats, flour, wheatgerm, and soy flour. Add finely chopped apricots, raisins, and sunflower seeds.
Mix oil, sweetener, and molasses separately, then add them to the dry ingredients. Incorporate as much orange juice as needed to form a soft but not runny mixture. Add salt.
Pour the apricot mixture into the prepared tin. Bake for 25 minutes.
Cool in the tin, cutting into fingers while still hot with a sharp knife. When cold, remove from the tin and store in an airtight container.
